blocks.body: Articles with Geographical Names explains when English place names need the and when they stay without any article.

{ "title": "12. Brief Synopsis", "items": [ "No article: Most countries, all cities, continents, individual mountains and islands.", "With the article the: oceans, seas, rivers, mountain systems, island groups, deserts.", "Countries with the: unions (the USA, the UK), plural (the Netherlands, the Philippines).", "The only city with the: The Hague (The Hague) the Gambia, the Congo, the Sudan.", "Use the pattern in the examples.", "Use the pattern in the examples.", "Use the pattern in the examples.", "Historical exceptions: the Gambia, the Congo, the Sudan." ] }
